name: Google AI Overview vs regular search - different legal protections?
description: Both Section 230 protected; AI slightly uncharted.

mainEntity.name: Google AI Overview vs regular search - different legal protections?

acceptedAnswer.text: Both Section 230 protected; AI slightly uncharted.
acceptedAnswer.description: Both under Section 230, but AI generative aspects untested; Heppner focuses on privilege, not liability.[1][3] Key factors: 'Publisher' status; hallucination claims emerging. Monitor cases. Similar protections expected.
